data.body:
## Description
Modify plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md Phase 2 Step 3 (Fidelity Review) to add the feasibility reviewer as a 4th parallel reviewer.

**Changes to brainstorm Phase 2 Step 3:**
- Add the feasibility reviewer to the reviewer table alongside the existing 3 reviewers
- Add trigger logic: dispatch feasibility reviewer when (a) feasibility_review_recommended is true from the complexity evaluator output, OR (b) epic spec contains integration signal keywords
- When feasibility_review_recommended is absent from evaluator output, fall back to keyword-only trigger
- Epics without integration signals skip the feasibility reviewer entirely
- Add Technical Feasibility dimension to the pass threshold check

**Trigger keywords** (categorical, not service-specific):
Third-party CLI tools, external APIs/services, CI/CD workflow changes, infrastructure provisioning, data format migrations, authentication/credential flows

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md — Edit

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Brainstorm references dso:feasibility-reviewer
  Verify: grep -q 'feasibility-reviewer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Brainstorm contains trigger logic for integration signals
  Verify: grep -q 'feasibility_review_recommended\|integration signal' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md

**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence.
